items.title: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack on occupied West Bank village
items.dek: The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control.
items.body: The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Prince Harry sued for defamation by charity Sentebale he co-founded
items.dek: Prince Harry left the charity last year in an acrimonious dispute over how Sentebale was being managed.
items.body: Prince Harry left the charity last year in an acrimonious dispute over how Sentebale was being managed.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
items.dek: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years.
items.body: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years.
items.author: IriLine Desk
